name: Airbnb — peer-to-peer accommodation platform
description: The textbook P2P accommodation two-sided platform. Two BMCs — guests (demand-side scale; pay nightly fare + service fee) and hosts (supply-side income; receive nightly fare minus host fee) — that together show how reviews substitute for prior brand trust, how AirCover works as the platform's insurance overlay, and how the negative cash conversion mechanic generates float at IPO scale.
